name: python-lib
description: Reusable Python library with pyproject.toml, tests, and CI-ready config

files.README.md:
# {{project_name}}

{{lib_description}}

## Install

```bash
pip install -e .
pip install -e .[dev]
```

## Test

```bash
pytest tests/ -v
```

## Build

```bash
pip install build
python -m build
```
files.pyproject.toml:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=64"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "{{project_name}}"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "{{lib_description}}"
requires-python = ">=3.11"
authors = [
    { name = "You" },
]

[project.optional-dependencies]
dev = ["pytest>=7", "pytest-cov>=4"]

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
include = ["{{project_name}}*"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]
files.{{project_name}}/__init__.py:
"""
{{project_name}} — {{lib_description}}.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

__version__ = "0.1.0"


def hello() -> str:
    """Return a greeting."""
    return "Hello from {{project_name}}!"
files.{{project_name}}/core.py:
"""
Core functionality for {{project_name}}."""

from __future__ import annotations


def add(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    """Add two integers."""
    return a + b
